rules.data_alignment: Right-align all numbers, prices, and quantities. Use tabular-nums utility.

spacing_and_layout.base_layout: Strict 100vh h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden flex flex-col. No global scroll. Inner scroll only inside DataGrid.
spacing_and_layout.density: Dense. Use padding steps: p-1, p-2, p-3. Maximum standard padding is p-4.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Sharp. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px max). Do not use rounded-lg, rounded-xl, or pill shapes.
spacing_and_layout.grid_row_height: h-8 (32px) or h-[28px]. Tight vertical padding py-1.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid everywhere. Use border-collapse for DataGrid items.

DataGrid.header: bg-slate-200 border-b border-slate-400 font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-700 sticky top-0 z-10
DataGrid.row: border-b border-slate-200 even:bg-slate-50 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors font-data text-sm h-8 flex items-center cursor-pointer

BigTotal.container: bg-blue-700 p-4 flex flex-col justify-end items-end border-b-4 border-blue-900 min-h-[120px] shadow-inner
BigTotal.label: text-blue-200 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
BigTotal.value: font-data text-[56px] font-bold text-white leading-none tracking-tight tabular-nums drop-shadow-md

FKeyButton.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-2 border rounded-sm transition-all duration-75 select-none cursor-pointer h-16 relative
FKeyButton.key_label: absolute top-1 left-1 text-[10px] font-data font-bold opacity-70

StatusBar.container: h-8 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 flex items-center justify-between px-4 text-xs font-data border-t-2 border-slate-700

ScanInput.container: flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-900 p-2 border-b-4 border-slate-700
ScanInput.input: bg-white border-2 border-blue-500 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 font-data text-lg w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-600 shadow-inner

icons.usage: Use sparingly. Prefer text labels. Use icons mainly for status bar, delivery/customer panel, and critical actions like Lock/Unlock shift.

interactions_and_motion.animations: Extremely minimal. Snappy immediate state changes. No fade-ins, no sliding panels. Use zero duration or 75ms max transitions for button presses.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Hard color shifts. E.g., hover:bg-slate-300, no opacity fades.
interactions_and_motion.focus: Aggressive focus rings on active inputs (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:outline-none).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute. Kebab-case, role-based. E.g., 'data-testid="pos-scan-input"', 'data-testid="fkey-payment"', 'data-testid="big-total-display"'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a FRONTEND-ONLY implementation using Dexie/IndexedDB for local storage.
Build a classic desktop workstation POS, NOT a modern cloud dashboard.
Enforce keyboard-first usage: Implement a global keydown listener to bind F1-F12 keys to their respective functions.
Layout structure should be: Top Header (Cashier Name, Shift Info) -> Left: DataGrid & Scan Input -> Right: Customer Panel & Big Total -> Bottom: F-Key rows -> Absolute Bottom: Status Bar.
Use IDR formatting for currency: Use a helper function to format numbers like '57.500'. Tabular nums are critical.

Components must use pure Tailwind classes mapped to the guidelines above. Do NOT use Shadcn Card component if it adds too much padding and rounded-xl borders. Strip Shadcn defaults to match the sharp, dense legacy POS vibe.
Implement the UI directly in React/JS/Tailwind.
